props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the component.

props.name: customClassName
props.description: Use for replacing default CIcon component classes. Prop is overriding the 'size' prop.

props.name: height
props.description: The height attribute defines the vertical length of an icon.

props.name: icon
props.description: Name of the icon placed in React object or SVG content.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the icon. Available sizes: 'sm', 'lg', 'xl', 'xxl', '3xl...9xl', 'custom', 'custom-size'.

props.name: use
props.description: If defined component will be rendered using 'use' tag.

props.name: viewBox
props.description: The viewBox attribute defines the position and dimension of an SVG viewport.

props.name: width
props.description: The width attribute defines the horizontal length of an icon.
